 {"id":"bd-2qjc","title":"Unit Tests: charmed_log formatting","description":"Unit tests for charmed_log logging framework.

## Current State
charmed_log has 179 lines of tests - very shallow for a logger.

## Test Requirements

### Log Formatting
- [ ] timestamp formats (RFC3339, custom)
- [ ] log level formatting
- [ ] message formatting
- [ ] structured field formatting
- [ ] caller information

### Level Filtering
- [ ] minimum level enforcement
- [ ] per-module level overrides
- [ ] runtime level changes

### Output Writers
- [ ] stdout/stderr selection
- [ ] file output
- [ ] custom writer support
- [ ] buffering behavior

### Styles
- [ ] color schemes by level
- [ ] custom color overrides
- [ ] no-color mode
- [ ] style with lipgloss integration

### Structured Logging
- [ ] key-value pairs
- [ ] nested structures
- [ ] array values
- [ ] special characters in values

### Edge Cases
- [ ] very long messages
- [ ] high-frequency logging
- [ ] concurrent logging
- [ ] newlines in messages

## Success Criteria
- All format options tested
- Thread safety verified
- Performance acceptable under load","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:52:57.710366058Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:01:22.773017056Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:01:22.772888106Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["charmed_log","testing","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qjc","depends_on_id":"bd-28co","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qq7","title":"Wizard: integrate with demo data + trigger jobs/deployments","description":"Wire wizard completion into the demo backend.

Implementation notes:
- Use the shared domain action API (`demo_showcase data: action API …`) so the Wizard and Jobs page don't depend on each other.

Examples:
- Starting a deployment creates a new Deployment + associated Job.
- Emits log lines and toasts.

Acceptance:
- Finishing the wizard immediately changes Dashboard/Jobs/Logs content.
- Behavior is covered by unit tests at the action-API layer.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:11:03.497458412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:28:55.427272909Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T18:28:55.427150902Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["data","demo_showcase","forms"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qq7","depends_on_id":"bd-1qwj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qq7","depends_on_id":"bd-28l3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qq7","depends_on_id":"bd-2omz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qq7","depends_on_id":"bd-3pm6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2qq7","depends_on_id":"bd-y3c8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2qx1","title":"demo_showcase page: Logs (styled + filterable)","description":"A live log viewer page that feels like a production-grade log tailer.

Why:
- Logging is where real apps live and die; this is the most convincing place to show `charmed_log` styling + ergonomics.
- It also provides the “ground truth” for cross-page workflows: Jobs should link to logs; errors should explain themselves.

Must showcase:
- `charmed_log`-styled output:
  - level coloring (trace/debug/info/warn/error)
  - structured fields (service, job_id, request_id, duration, user)
  - readable formatting even at narrow widths
- Bubbles viewport:
  - smooth scrolling, jump to top/bottom
  - follow mode (“tail -f”) that pauses when the user scrolls up
  - optional line wrapping toggle
- Filtering/search:
  - filter by level and service
  - query search with match highlight + next/prev navigation
  - correlation filters (e.g., “show logs for selected job”)
- Actions:
  - copy selected range or last N lines
  - export to a file (with a clear artifact path) and show toast confirmation
  - clear/reset view (without breaking follow mode)

Data requirements:
- Log stream is deterministic in test mode and correlated with the Jobs simulation.
- Includes occasional warnings/errors so filtering and drill-down are meaningful.

Acceptance:
- Looks and feels like a real log tailer (usable, not flashy-for-flashy’s-sake).
- Filtering is instant and predictable; follow mode never fights the user.

Testing:
- Unit tests:
  - filter + search correctness (stable ordering, edge cases)
  - follow mode logic (scroll up pauses, scroll bottom resumes)
  - export/copy behavior produces expected artifacts/messages
- E2E:
  - wizard -> job -> logs correlation scenario
  - logs copy/export/clear scenario (verifies artifacts + JSONL logs)

Notes:
- Avoid “fake rainbow logs”; prioritize legibility and density.
- Ensure `--no-color` / ASCII modes still produce clear output.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:09:22.489282051Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:17:42.678651544Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T00:17:42.678509840Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["charmed_log","demo_showcase","logs","page"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2qx1","depends_on_id":"bd-2pzh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
+{"id":"bd-2rlk","title":"Replace assert!(false) fallback in ssh_e2e bad-password flow","description":"In crates/demo_showcase/tests/ssh_e2e.rs, remove the synthetic assert!(false, ...) fallback in the bad-password test command-spawn branch and replace it with a direct assertion on Result plus explicit early return for type flow. Keeps test failure semantics while reducing code smell.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:43:35.192028874Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T02:44:21.504226780Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T02:44:21.504162761Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-2s30","title":"Demo Showcase: migrate logs.rs to poison-safe RwLock","description":"# Migrate logs.rs RwLock usage to poison-safe pattern

## What
Replace all .read().unwrap() and .write().unwrap() calls in pages/logs.rs with
the chosen poison-safe mechanism (parking_lot or extension trait).

## Affected Fields (4 RwLock instances)
1. viewport: RwLock<Viewport> — scrollable content viewport
2. formatted_content: RwLock<String> — cached formatted log output
3. needs_reformat: RwLock<bool> — cache invalidation flag
4. last_dims: RwLock<(usize, usize)> — last rendered dimensions

## Approximate Locations (~26 call sites)
- Lines 278, 413, 421, 423, 431, 437, 463, 483, 521, 522, 535
- Lines 659, 737, 742, 762, 768, 829, 844, 846, 849, 855-857, 869, 888, 891

## Mechanical Change
For each site, replace:
    self.viewport.write().unwrap()
With (parking_lot):
    self.viewport.write()
Or (extension trait):
    self.viewport.write_or_recover()

## Depends On
- bd-3v3x (create the mechanism first)

## Key File
- crates/demo_showcase/src/pages/logs.rs","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-29T17:40:44.528282420Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T23:51:14.633352760Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T23:51:14.633286186Z","close_reason":"Migration completed as part of bd-3v3x","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","reliability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2s30","depends_on_id":"bd-3v3x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2s30","depends_on_id":"bd-ykth","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":13,"issue_id":"bd-2s30","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. Zero .read().unwrap() or .write().unwrap() on RwLock in logs.rs
2. All 26 call sites migrated to poison-safe pattern
3. cargo check -p demo_showcase passes
4. cargo test -p demo_showcase -- logs passes
5. Verify with: grep -n "unwrap()" crates/demo_showcase/src/pages/logs.rs | grep -E "read|write" returns empty","created_at":"2026-01-29T23:47:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2s8s","title":"SSH mode: basic auth + middleware polish","description":"Optional but high-impact polish: demonstrate `wish` authentication + middleware patterns without adding real complexity.

Why:
- SSH apps are more compelling when they feel "deployable" (even if it’s just a demo).
- Auth + middleware is a signature part of Wish’s architecture.

What to implement (choose one minimal auth mechanism):
- Password auth for demo (env/flag configured), OR
- Public-key allowlist (a small allowlist file / embedded demo key), OR
- "Local only" banner + explicit opt-in flag for public bind

Middleware polish:
- Connection logging middleware:
  - log connect/disconnect, username, remote addr, session duration
- Nice-to-have:
  - idle timeout / keepalive
  - connection banner (app name, version, keybindings hint)

Constraints:
- Must be clearly labeled "demo" and safe by default.
- Must not block non-SSH mode builds (feature-gated behind SSH feature).

Acceptance:
- Demonstrates Wish middleware/auth patterns end-to-end.
- Misconfiguration yields a friendly error/log message (not a panic).","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:13:52.852345698Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T01:53:01.942312420Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T01:53:01.942228804Z","close_reason":"Implemented password authentication with CLI flags (--password, --username, --no-auth) and env vars (DEMO_SSH_PASSWORD, DEMO_SSH_USERNAME). Added session duration tracking with SessionStats and SessionGuard. Rate-limited auth prevents brute-force attacks. All changes feature-gated behind SSH feature.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","ssh","wish"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2s8s","depends_on_id":"bd-3chy","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2s8s","depends_on_id":"bd-3xs0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2szb","title":"Animations: respect --no-animations / reduce motion","description":"Implement an app-wide toggle to disable motion.

Implementation notes:
- Drive from `demo_showcase::Config.no_animations` + runtime Settings toggle.
- All animations must consult this single source of truth.

Acceptance:
- Disabling motion does not break layout.
- Tests can force no-animations to make rendering deterministic.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:13:03.384394507Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T03:21:30.763177062Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T03:21:30.763109967Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["a11y","anim","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2szb","depends_on_id":"bd-2fnc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2szb","depends_on_id":"bd-2q95","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2szb","depends_on_id":"bd-ab35","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:03Z","created_by":"import"}]}
